name: @openclaw/crabhelm
description: Cloudflare and AWS control planes for independently deployed OpenClaw agents.

scripts.build: tsgo --noEmit && pnpm worker:check && node --check web/app.js && node --check deploy/runtime-bridge.mjs && esbuild index.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --target=node22 --outfile=dist/index.js --external:openclaw/*
scripts.check: pnpm build && pnpm test && pnpm test:workers && pnpm aws:check
scripts.aws:build: tsgo -p tsconfig.aws.json --noEmit && esbuild aws/server.ts --bundle --banner:js="import { createRequire as __crabhelmCreateRequire } from 'node:module'; const require = __crabhelmCreateRequire(import.meta.url);" --platform=node --format=esm --target=node22 --outfile=dist/aws/server.js --external:aws-crt --external:bufferutil --external:pg-native --external:utf-8-validate && node --check dist/aws/server.js && node --input-type=module --eval "const module = await import('./dist/aws/server.js'); if (typeof module.startAwsServer !== 'function') process.exit(1);"
scripts.worker:check: tsgo -p tsconfig.worker.json --noEmit && tsgo -p tsconfig.workers-test.json --noEmit && wrangler deploy --dry-run
